name: Portman Ridge Finance Corporation Common Stock
summary: Portman Ridge Finance Corporation is a publicly traded, externally managed investment company focused on generating current income and, to a lesser extent, capital appreciation through investment in a portfolio of primarily directly originated, senior secured, first lien term loans to privately held U.S. companies. The company operates as a specialty finance company, providing customized credit solutions to middle-market businesses. Portman Ridge Finance Corporation is headquartered in New York, NY.
